title: Runway Slot Timetable View
description: The system shall display a slot timetable per runway that includes delays and emergency flights.
rationale: This requirement ensures air traffic controllers can efficiently manage runway scheduling by providing real-time visibility of flight statuses, including delays and emergencies.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency through better management of runway slots and prioritization of emergency operations.

source.description: As a air traffic controller I need to view a slot timetable per runway that includes delays and emergency flights So that I can manage runway scheduling efficiently and prioritize emergency operations

acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the runway slot timetable view
When I select a specific runway
Then I see a list of scheduled slots for that runway
And each slot shows the flight ID, scheduled time, and current status (on-time, delayed, or emergency)
preconditions: The runway slot timetable view is accessible to authorized air traffic controllers
postconditions: The selected runway's slot timetable is displayed
Each slot's status is accurately updated based on real-time data
functional_constraints: Delays are shown as updated departure/arrival times
Emergency flights are clearly marked (e.g., with a flag or color)
security_requirements: Access to the runway slot timetable view is restricted to authorized personnel only

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system shall respond within 2 seconds for each query
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system should handle up to 10,000 runway slots per minute during peak times
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages are clear and informative; the interface is intuitive and easy to navigate

edge_cases: What happens when there are no scheduled slots for a runway?
How should the system handle delays that extend beyond the runway's operating hours?
What if an emergency flight is added while the controller is viewing another runway?

interfaces.name: Flight Information API
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with an external system to retrieve real-time flight data, including delays and emergency statuses.

interfaces.name: Runway Schedule Database
interfaces.description: The requirement accesses a database to fetch the current schedule of runway slots and update their statuses in real-time.

test_cases.description: Verify display of scheduled slots for a specific runway.
test_cases.expected_result: A list of scheduled slots for the selected runway is displayed, showing flight IDs and current statuses.

test_cases.description: Test delay updates in slot timetable.
test_cases.expected_result: Delays are correctly reflected as updated departure/arrival times in the slot timetable.
Emergency flights are clearly flagged or colored differently from regular flights.
